title: Moar Ores
description: A small mod that focuses on adding brand new ores along with adding extra uses for existing ores.
body:
## What does the mod add?
Moar Ores adds multiple new ores throughout the world. The Overworld and The Nether both currently have something new to go and mine, with additional content being planned for The End.

## Features
- Opal, Ruby, and Rose Quartz are now present in the world, with Ruby being exclusive to The Nether. All of them can be crafted into compact block forms, just like the vanilla ores.
- Surrounding a Block of Rose Quartz with 8 Rose Quartz will give a Rose Heart, a new special food item that temporarily gives Absorption.

## Where to report bugs
If you happen to encounter a bug, the best place to go is [my Discord server](https://discord.gg/9XaYmJr7QD). I'll always check #bug-reports first.
